project.name: discreet-dynasties
project.description: Wealth preservation and dynasty planning content site with membership tiers, AI advisors, FATE assessment, and community features.

tour.title: Entry Point: Root Layout & Auth Config
tour.description: The app shell starts at app/layout.tsx which imports Providers (SessionProvider + ThemeProvider), Navigation, Footer, and JSON-LD structured data. auth.ts configures NextAuth with Prisma adapter, Resend email, and GitHub providers.

tour.title: Database & Configuration Layer
tour.description: lib/db.ts creates a singleton Prisma client over Neon Postgres. lib/config.ts exports site URLs. lib/stripe.ts manages Stripe integration with price IDs, customer creation, and role mapping for the tiered membership model.

tour.title: Membership Tiers & Access Control
tour.description: lib/auth-helpers.ts defines the UserRole type and tier-based access functions: canAccessDD, canAccessDDPremium, isDDDynast plus tier label/badge utilities. These gate access throughout the app for free, subscriber, and dynast tiers.

tour.title: The DD Book: Content Engine
tour.description: lib/dd/book.ts defines chapters, sections, and navigation helpers. The book pages render Markdown content with react-markdown, gated by membership tier. lib/ai/rag.ts enables RAG search over book content using OpenAI embeddings.

tour.title: AI Companion & Advisors
tour.description: lib/ai/prompts.ts defines the DD system identity, archetypes, and advisor personas (Machiavelli, Seneca, etc.). The companion page lets users chat with AI advisors. lib/ai-models.ts abstracts Claude, GPT-4o, and Grok behind a unified callModel interface.

tour.title: FATE Assessment & Pathways
tour.description: lib/dd/fate.ts implements the FATE audit (Financial, Alliances, Tactical, Estate domains). lib/dd/pathways.ts defines structured weekly learning pathways. These feed the Forge dashboard where users track progress.

tour.title: Social Dispatch System
tour.description: lib/social/ implements a multi-platform dispatcher: index.ts orchestrates Facebook, Instagram, and X posting. lib/story-arc.ts detects active narrative arcs. Cron routes (social, evergreen, publish) trigger automated posting via orchestrator.

tour.title: Community Hall & Engagement
tour.description: The Hall is a member forum with posts, comments, and likes. The Vow system lets members take formal commitments. Gift codes enable admin-created membership gifts with Resend email delivery.

tour.title: Admin Dashboard & Billing
tour.description: The admin section manages users, email blasts, gifts, and the Armory (AI document generator). Stripe webhooks handle subscription lifecycle. The health endpoint reports DB and Stripe connectivity for orchestrator monitoring.
